chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.basic.1: <Abyssal Corrupter> Let the abyss gnaw through you.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.basic.2: <Abyssal Corrupter> Every struggle feeds the infection.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.basic.3: <Abyssal Corrupter> Too slow. Decay has already taken root.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.basic.4: <Abyssal Corrupter> Kneel. I will erode what remains.
<Abyssal Corrupter> Domain: Echoing Pulse. Every sound you make betrays you.
<Abyssal Corrupter> Hide your steps if you can. The red echo already knows your fear.
<Abyssal Corrupter> Crouch, hold your breath, pray... this graveyard still hears the living.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.mirage.1: <Abyssal Corrupter> Count the shells if you like. The scream begins when your choice fails.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.mirage.2: <Abyssal Corrupter> Miss the true flesh, and every shadow answers at once.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.mirage.3: <Abyssal Corrupter> Three heartbeats. Find me, or drown in the blast.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.armory.1: <Abyssal Corrupter> Abyssal armory. I will nail you to the field.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.armory.2: <Abyssal Corrupter> Watch the deep open its arsenal.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.armory.3: <Abyssal Corrupter> No shelter. No reprieve. Only execution.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.coral.1: <Abyssal Corrupter> Sonic Nova. Find the seam between endings.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.coral.2: <Abyssal Corrupter> Hear the pulse in my chest? That is your warning.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.coral.3: <Abyssal Corrupter> When the scream blooms, hesitation dies first.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.trench.1: <Abyssal Corrupter> Resonance Singularity. Come closer and be unmade.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.trench.2: <Abyssal Corrupter> Even your arrows will bend their knees to my heart.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.trench.3: <Abyssal Corrupter> Struggle all you want. Gravity serves the abyss.
chat.abyssal_corrupter.skill.phase_trans: <Abyssal Corrupter> You have only scraped the surface of what festers below.
<Abyssal Corrupter> Good. Rage sharpens the corruption.
<Abyssal Corrupter> The seal cracks. The abyss comes through me.
<Abyssal Corrupter> Now you face the part that devours worlds.
message.abyssal_corrupter.altar.boss_nea: Another Abyssal Corrupter is already nearby.
message.abyssal_corrupter.altar.needs_ca: The altar demands an Echo Shard.
title.abyssal_corrupter.ritual.opening.s: The altar brands this ground as a battlefield.
title.abyssal_corrupter.ritual.seal.subt: The Corrupter cannot leave. The field will drag it back.
title.abyssal_corrupter.ritual.arrival.s: Fight inside the seal, or watch the abyss restore its champion.
